recommendations.title: Emmanuelle: The Joys of a Woman
recommendations.overview: Emmanuelle returns to her husband in Hong Kong and proceeds to have several extramarital affairs -- with his knowledge, of course. Her husband's lover and American guest are both very puzzled by their openness.

recommendations.title: CODA
recommendations.overview: As a CODA (Child of Deaf Adults), Ruby is the only hearing person in her deaf family. When the family's fishing business is threatened, Ruby finds herself torn between pursuing her love of music and her fear of abandoning her parents.

recommendations.title: The Way of the Dragon
recommendations.overview: After a Chinese restaurant in Rome is threatened by the mafia, who will stop at nothing to acquire the property, the owner recruits a family friend in Hong Kong, kung fu expert Tang Lung, to help them defend their business.

recommendations.title: Skiptrace
recommendations.overview: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle against a notorious Chinese criminal.

recommendations.title: Bloodsport
recommendations.overview: An American Army Major goes AWOL to Hong Kong for an outlawed martial arts contest called the Kumite.

recommendations.title: The Unbelievable Truth
recommendations.overview: After serving time for murder, Josh Hutton returns to his home town where he meets Audry Hugo. No one can remember exactly what Josh did...

recommendations.title: Police Story 3: Super Cop
recommendations.overview: A Hong Kong detective teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug czar.

recommendations.title: Hello, Love, Goodbye
recommendations.overview: A bartender and a domestic helper of Filipino origin living in Hong Kong find themselves falling in love, but they each have different plans for their future.

recommendations.title: Knock Off
recommendations.overview: A fashion designer and his CIA agent business partner must join forces to stop a group of terrorists from smuggling explosives in counterfeit jeans during the handover of Hong Kong.

recommendations.title: Blackhat
recommendations.overview: Nicholas Hathaway, a furloughed convict, and his American and Chinese partners hunt a high-level cybercrime network from Chicago to Los Angeles to Hong Kong to Jakarta. As Hathaway closes in, the stakes become personal as he discovers that the attack
